name: Prof. Dr. Mallika Kumar
title: Professor of Economics and Founder Coordinator, Office of International Programmes, Shri Ram College of Commerce, University of Delhi.
bio: Prof. Dr. Mallika Kumar is Professor of Economics and Founder Coordinator of the Office of International Programmes at Shri Ram College of Commerce, University of Delhi. With over 33 years of teaching experience, her work spans cooperatives, women empowerment, sustainable development goals, international education, and institutional partnerships. She has represented India across global academic and cooperative forums, including engagements with the United Nations, UNESCAP, ICA-AP, universities, ministries, and international organizations.
